metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Culinary Arts 10 introduces students to professional cooking techniques, food preparation, nutrition science, and the cultural significance of food. Students learn knife skills, food safety, cooking methods, and recipe development while exploring how food connects to culture, health, and sustainability. Hands-on projects build competence and confidence in the kitchen.
metadata.general_description: Elective course focused on culinary techniques, food science, nutrition, and food culture.

big_ideas.statement: Culinary arts combine technique, science, and creativity to create nourishing and meaningful food experiences.
big_ideas.elaboration: Cooking is both a technical skill and an art form. Students learn that understanding ingredients, methods, and chemistry enables them to create food that is delicious, nutritious, and safe while expressing creativity and cultural identity.

big_ideas.statement: Food connects to culture, tradition, sustainability, and health in ways that matter to individuals and communities.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students explore how different cultures use food to celebrate, nourish, and connect. They learn to appreciate diverse food traditions and understand how food choices affect personal health and environmental sustainability.

big_ideas.statement: Professional food preparation requires precision, planning, and discipline alongside creativity and adaptation.
big_ideas.elaboration: Whether cooking at home or in professional kitchens, success depends on understanding recipes, managing time, maintaining food safety, and troubleshooting when things don't go as planned.

big_ideas.statement: Food design—recipes, menus, and presentations—reflects the designer's understanding of ingredients, techniques, and audience.
big_ideas.elaboration: Creating appealing and nourishing dishes involves thoughtful consideration of flavors, textures, nutrition, cost, and cultural context. Students develop design thinking skills through culinary projects.

i_can_statements: I can create original recipes that combine flavors and techniques skillfully
I can adapt recipes for different dietary needs and preferences
I can design balanced, nutritious menus for various occasions
I can consider cultural significance when designing food experiences
I can plan menus that work within time and budget constraints
I can break down recipes into preparation steps and timelines
I can source quality ingredients sustainably
I can organize a kitchen workflow efficiently
I can plate dishes attractively and professionally
I can consider color, texture, and visual balance in presentations
I can design food presentations appropriate for different contexts
I can communicate through food design and presentation

competencies.raw: Explore and incorporate diverse food traditions
i_can_statements: I can research and respect food traditions from different cultures
I can adapt traditional recipes while honoring their origins
I can learn from Indigenous food traditions and sustainability practices
I can create fusion dishes thoughtfully and respectfully

competencies.raw: Master fundamental knife and food preparation skills
i_can_statements: I can perform basic cuts and knife techniques safely and efficiently
I can prepare ingredients with proper technique
I can use kitchen equipment correctly and safely
I can execute basic food preparation tasks with precision
I can execute various cooking methods (sautéing, roasting, boiling, etc.)
I can control heat and timing to achieve desired results
I can troubleshoot when cooking techniques don't work as expected
I can adapt techniques for different ingredients and equipment

competencies.raw: Maintain food safety and sanitation standards
i_can_statements: I can practice proper food handling and storage procedures
I can prevent cross-contamination and foodborne illness
I can maintain a clean and organized kitchen
I can understand and follow food safety regulations

competencies.raw: Work independently and collaboratively in food preparation
i_can_statements: I can execute complex recipes independently
I can work efficiently in a team kitchen environment
I can manage multiple dishes simultaneously
I can clean up and maintain kitchen organization
I can explain how ingredients react and interact during cooking
I can understand nutrition and macronutrient content
I can apply food science to solve cooking problems
I can make informed choices about ingredients and methods
I can operate various kitchen appliances and equipment
I can understand how modern food technology works
I can use food preservation and storage technologies
I can adapt to different equipment and settings

competencies.raw: Apply digital tools to culinary work
i_can_statements: I can use recipe software and digital cookbooks
I can analyze nutritional information using digital tools
I can document and share recipes and processes digitally
I can research food trends and techniques online

competencies.raw: Understand sustainable and ethical food practices
i_can_statements: I can source local, seasonal, and sustainable ingredients
I can reduce food waste and use ingredients efficiently
I can understand food production systems and their impact
I can make ethical food choices

areas.name: Knife Skills and Ingredient Preparation
topics: Mise en place and kitchen organization

areas.name: Cooking Methods and Techniques
topics: Wet cooking methods (boiling, steaming, braising, poaching)
Dry cooking methods (roasting, baking, grilling, sautéing)

areas.name: Food Science and Nutrition
topics: How ingredients react and transform during cooking
Food allergies and food intolerance management
Menu planning for health and wellness

areas.name: Cultural Food Traditions and Sustainability
topics: Food traditions from Indigenous and diverse cultures
Food waste reduction and zero-waste cooking
Food ethics and fair trade practices
Food as cultural expression and celebration
